# BeOS / Haiku — Tracker, Deskbar, replicants

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** A

**Notes:** Yellow-tab windows + title-bar tabs = window-identity vocabulary. Deskbar 'always on top' list-style task UI.

**Credits / sources:** haiku-os.org, toastytech.com, discuss.haiku-os.org, Wikimedia Commons.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
